steps.title: Set up the ratio
steps.content:
The problem asks for the ratio of green cards to yellow cards.
Imani has 9 green cards and 36 yellow cards.
The ratio is 9 to 36.

steps.title: Simplify the ratio
steps.content:
Find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of 9 and 36. Notice that $36 = 9 \times 4$, so 9 is a common factor.
Divide both parts by 9:
$$\frac{9 \div 9}{36 \div 9} = \frac{1}{4}$$
The simplified ratio is 1 to 4. That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
